endpoints: POST /employee — body: {firstName, lastName, userType:'STANDARD', department:{id:DEP_ID}, email, dateOfBirth, phoneNumberMobile}
PUT /employee/{id} — GET first for id+version, then PUT full object
common_errors: userType cannot be 0 or empty — always set to STANDARD, EXTENDED, or NO_ACCESS
tips: If task mentions 'administrator' or 'admin', set userType to EXTENDED
